name: Ld's Homade Mayonnaise
recipeInstructions:
1. In a blender, combine the eggs, vinegar, mustard and seasoning salt.
2. Gradually add vegetable oil to the mixture while the blender continues running. Add the oil very slowly to maintain a smooth emulsion.
3. Continue blending until all ingredients are well incorporated. You may need to stir gently toward the end of adding the oil.
4. Makes 1 Pint
